scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pg/shared && npm run build -w @pg/submission && npm run build -w @pg/api && npm run build:next -w @pg/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @pg/shared && npm run build -w @pg/submission && npm run build:next -w @pg/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pg/shared && npm run typecheck -w @pg/submission && npm run typecheck -w @pg/api && npm run typecheck -w @pg/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @pg/api && npm run lint -w @pg/web
